entry.title: How to maintain/display 'Contact Information' tab in PO/PI message monitoring page?
entry.content:
Hi, Who knows how to maintain/display 'Contact Information' tab in PO/PI message monitoring page? If the contact information can record the owner info of sender or receiver system, it will be very helpful and useful for operation work with more efficiency and convenience.

Any feedback will be appreciated.

entry.title: 关于销售订单与交货数量及开票数量的问题
entry.content:
在创建销售订单时，已确定订单数量。

1、由于生产过程中存在正常的损耗，所以交货数量是实际产出的合格数量，而开票数量可能等于实际合格品的交货数量，也可能等于订单数量。

2、当一段时间后对客户进行不合格品交货时，不需要给客户开票，也不需要向客户收款。

针对以上业务情况，在配置为参考交货单开票的情况下：

1、如何实现在开票时修改开票数量。

2、如何实现在创建交货单时，选择不开票。

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: nice! thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere and SAP Data Intelligence Cloud - what does this mean for me now?
entry.content:
Thanks both @David_Quirk  and @TuncayKaraca 

We are in the process of reviewing a transition from SAP DI to SAP DataSphere and have a scenario where we are triggering pipeline using the OOTB 'Pipeline Engine' API to trigger SAP DI Graphs. At this time I dont see any DataSphere version of this specific feature now or in the roadmap.

entry.title: Re: SAP API OData Security Part III – OAuth2.0 Authorization Code Flow

Hi Ravi

I have a question on this - although I can get an OAUTH2 Token via POSTMAN as described it would NOT be practical if I wanted a 3rd Party application to call the APIs - as the Token access requires a scope approval popup from S4HC.

I have posted a specific question on this but I am interested in your reply if you can.

How to use OAuth 2.0 authorization while using SAP... - SAP Community

Thanks !.

entry.title: SAP BPA file upload into S4
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm currently playing around with SAP Build Process Automation (BPA) and I'm wondering if there is a way to implement a file upload that consumes an OData service to send data to back to S/4 (on Premise) inside of BPA or by importing an SAPUI5 app/workflow task?

Thanks

entry.title: If I run Cross-Model Copy while doing a lot of data mapping in SAC, what should I do?
entry.content:
Hi, Experts,

I am trying to create a model of Sales plan and copy it to the model of PL by profit center in SAC.
The sales plan model has a "Material ID" and which has "Profit Center" property.
On the other hand, the PL by profit center model has a "Profit Center" dimension, but there are no dimensions or properties related to "Material ID".

I want to aggregate the sales Amount for each "Material ID" in the Sales Plan by profit center, which is a property of the "Material ID", and copy them to the PL model by Profit Center.

For now, I tried the Cross-Model Copy, a data action.
I was able to do this by using copy rules to map the Material ID to the Profit Center, but I think this is a way to deal with only a small number of target data as below.

If I run Cross-Model Copy while doing a lot of data mapping in SAC, what should I do?

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling

Hi satoko_nakayama,

Best regards, William

entry.title: Is it possible to Import and use a custom fiori/sapui5 application in Build Process Automation(BTP)?
entry.content: As said in the subject I am trying to import a custom fiori application into a process in the SPA BTP Build process automation. I've tried changing the Manifest to include sap.bpa.task and changed the component.js file to include the usual code that is generated when creating a Custom Task UI. Technically while I can import the form into the process, it throws the error shown in the image and won't function in the Inbox as an approval form.

entry.title: LMS - Is there a way to upload External event learning history in bulk at once?
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to know about the way to upload External event learning history in bulk.

Is there a  function like "System Administration > System Management Tools > Import Data"? As far as I know, this feature doesn't work for external event.

I know there is a menu "Manage User Learning > Add to Learning History for Multiple Courses", but I want to upload the history data of each of the multiple users taking different courses at once.

If there's a way, please let me know.

entry.title: SAP CAL Subscription Error
entry.content:
I want to buy a sap cloud appliance subscription.

when i clicked the 'buy subscription for partner' button, I got this message:

This product is limited to partners participating in our SAP PartnerEdge program.
Your current participation agreement status, does not qualify for this offer.
Please reach out to your partner manager or contact us here.

I'm a SAP Partner (Partner Type: OE Build Authorization). But why can't I buy the subscription?

entry.title: Old values are restating while updating the withholding tax
entry.content: While updating the withholding tax codes in BP, system is automatically restates the tax category field value in Identification tab of BP general data.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements - Save Variant/Layout not working...
entry.content: Hi Joel, I activated the UI5 ICF node (LREP was already active) but unfortunately it has made no difference to the ability of my app to save the layout/variant.

entry.title: Enhanced Data Analysis of Fitness Data using HANA Vector Engine, Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Extending on my fitness related datasets and using some more 2024 based capabilities, I will not go into details on how I get it into Datasphere, as I covered this previously with a Travel Sustainability Blog. 

Digging into further analysis of the data, using some newer technologies and datasets, I want to focus on a couple of areas:

  1. Finding Similar Activities using the HANA Vector Engine
  2. Using External Datasets to enrich data, and in my case find areas of concern using HANA Spatial Engine (not new but always good to use newer datasets). 
  3. Restricting data between users using SAP Data Access Controls.

Also additional SAP Analytics Cloud examples developed will be demo'ed as part of a Webinar that will be linked to this blog. 

With a bit more details:

  1. Finding Similar Events using the HANA Vector Engine

Using a dataset of about 2000 different activities, the goal was to find similar efforts, irrespective of location. Here is a sample of a few records to get an idea of the dataset:

Sample Activity Dataset

 Using the columns: Elapsed Time, Distance. Relative Effort and Elevation Gain - I created vectors in the HANA Cloud based on these values:

 

ALTER TABLE LOCAL_ACTIVITIES ADD (EMBEDDING REAL_VECTOR); 

UPDATE LOCAL_ACTIVITIES SET EMBEDDING = TO_REAL_VECTOR('[
'||to_varchar("Elapsed Time")||',
'||to_varchar("Distance")||',
'||to_varchar("Relative Effort")||',
'||to_varchar("Elevation Gain")||']')
WHERE "Elapsed Time" IS NOT NULL
AND "Distance" IS NOT NULL
AND "Relative Effort" IS NOT NULL;

 

 

Then creating a view on this, which can be used as a view / SQL query in Datasphere:

 

CREATE VIEW RELATED_ACTIVITIES_VECTOR_V as
SELECT 
A."Activity Date" AS "SourceActivityDate", B."Activity Date"  AS "TargetActivityDate", A."Activity Name" AS  "SourceActivityName",
B."Activity Name" as "TargetActivityName", A."Distance" AS  "SourceDistance",
B."Distance" AS  "TargetDistance", A."Relative Effort"  AS "SourceRelativeEffort", B."Relative Effort" AS  "TargetRelativeEffort",
A."Elevation Gain"  AS "SourceElevationGain", B."Elevation Gain" AS  "TargetElevationGain",
cosine_similarity(A.EMBEDDING, B.EMBEDDING) COS,
l2distance(A.EMBEDDING, B.EMBEDDING) L2
FROM LOCAL_ACTIVITIES A, LOCAL_ACTIVITIES B
WHERE A."Activity ID" > B."Activity ID"
AND cosine_similarity(A.EMBEDDING, B.EMBEDDING) > .999999
AND l2distance(A.EMBEDDING, B.EMBEDDING) < 100;

 

Then making the query available in Datasphere and presenting the results in SAP Analytics Cloud:

HANA Vector Query Output - in SAP Analytics Cloud

2. Using External Datasets to enrich data, and in my case find areas of Concern using HANA Spatial Engine. 

In a separate Datasphere space, we have a range of Global Crisis Datasets. For me and my fitness data, I thought the simplest would be determining if I ran near any fires as part of my run. Yes, this data is hindsight - but either way an interesting use case. we easily build a BTP Build App that is preventative to the user, but I'll leave that for someone else in my team to build. 

So picking Queensland and New South Wales fire data, and joining them together:

Linking QLD and NSW Fire datasets

In a relatively simple query, I can perform geospatial analysis query based on location and time:

 

SELECT distinct "L_ROW", "Activity ID", "ACTIVITY_DATE", "Activity Type", "SOURCE", "DESCRIPTION", TO_INTEGER("GEO".ST_TRANSFORM( 3857 ).ST_Distance("ST_POINT_3857", 'kilometer')) "Distance_KM", 
    "A"."LATITUDE" "ACTIVITY_LATITUDE", 
    "A"."LONGITUDE" "ACTIVITY_LONGITUDE", 
    "C"."LATITUDE" "CRISIS_LATITUDE", 
    "C"."LONGITUDE" "CRISIS_LONGITUDE"
FROM "INITIAL" "A", "BTP_CRISIS.Crisis_Dataset" "C"
where "GEO".ST_TRANSFORM( 3857 ).ST_Distance("ST_POINT_3857", 'kilometer') < 2
and "ACTIVITY_DATE" BETWEEN add_days("PUBLISHED", -1) AND add_days("PUBLISHED", 1)

 

This query is finding all the fire warnings that were published within 1 day, and within 2 km of my start point of the run. I could have also made these parameters, so that the user can also dynamically choose the timescale and the distance. I could also have used the query to be based on any point on the run. Maybe as a V2.

Once, I enable this data to be viewed in SAC, I can quickly get the output:

Local Concerns from my Activity location

3. Restricting data between users using SAP Data Access Controls.

The data I am loading into the SAP Datasphere instance is multi-user and there is a requirement to keep it isolated across users. So to ensure data privacy, the Datasphere Data Access Controls 

The datasets is unique by user of the Strava Id, so we can simply apply Data Access Controls to limit to their own datasets. For this, a reference table / view is needed, and we simply create a Data Access Control over based on the requirements:

Creating Data Access Controls in Datasphere

Applying the Data Access Controls to the appropriate Views:

Apply to the View

 

Linking the Data Access Control

 

Now we have a platform that allows us to performs some rich data analysis using modern tools that suit the individual - using their own datasets. Some examples that have been used are around Jupyter Notebooks, DBeaver Analysis and also using text input the Vector engine to match this to the existing datasets. More to come in future blogs and Webinars. 

Personally, I think it's so much more interesting using you own datasets, in this case a personal fitness dataset - or in the business world , your own systems data - which can easily be supplemented into this technology to gain some invaluable insights. 

If you have any other scenarios, let me know and I'll see if I - or we can cover it as part of our next Workshop on this. 

Cheers

Jon

entry.title: Re: why go for RAP in sap
entry.content:
Hi,
You should google a bit before posting here. Here is why to go for RAP -

RAP is an enabler for improving the user experience and innovating business processes in ABAP-based SAP solutions by leveraging SAP Fiori, SAP HANA, and the Cloud. It is a long-term strategic solution for ABAP development on SAP’s flagship product SAP S/4HANA, cloud and on-premise (as of release 1909) editions, as well as on the SAP BTP ABAP Environment. 

SAP uses RAP to build new standard applications and modernize existing ones. SAP also recommends its customers and partners to use it for their custom developments on SAP S/4HANA and SAP BTP ABAP Environment. 

Reference: Modernization with the ABAP RESTful Application Pr... - SAP Community.

Thanks,
Sachin

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP - Behavior Projection and Implementation Class
entry.content:
The relationship is not between the annotation @AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK and the implementation class, but when you create a Behavior Definition (BDEF), and you specify strict mode, you must specify - "authorization master". And when you do that, you must define a method in the implementation class for this.
Now, if you skip creating the implementation class, the framework will be unable to find a method corresponds to authorization you have defined in the BDEF, hence the dump.
Also, the method will be part of local class inheriting from CL_ABAP_BEHAVIOR_HANDLER, hence the exception raised is CX_RAP_HANDLER_NOT_IMPLEMENTED.

entry.title: Re: Variant management & View functionality
entry.content: Hello @julienmoigno , thanks for the reply. Just to confirm, my query was related to difference between Variant management and view creation in Process manager Graphic editor , where we create (Model) different view according to the requirement.

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP - Behavior Projection and Implementation Class
entry.content: Hi @asm_sapdev, The AccessControl annotation in CDS view allow us to use that BO in access control data definition that we create. It is used for data level restriction. While, the authorization you see in Behavior Definition is to implement the authorization on UI level. So, if you don't want to create implementation class, don't use strict mode and remove authorization master (global/instance) from the BDEF.

entry.title: Re: Order Standard Costs Based on Material Cannot be Calc...
entry.content:
Please check the "Start" date and "End" date of the order. If the the standard cost is not released within this date, the message "Order Standard costs based on material XXXX cannot be calculated." will come.

For example if the cost is released from 04.04.2024 to 30.04.2024

and the order start date is 30.05.2024-  The message will pop up.

entry.title: Re: S/4 EHS: Hazardous substance inventory cannot be crea...
entry.content:
Hi,
Have you assigned the plant 0001 to a location of type "Firmenstandort / (DE)"?

Regards,

Neeraj Agrawal

entry.title: Duplicate rows appear in the story report.
entry.content:
Hi community, 

Recently, I have been making a LMS Story Report at the request of the HR manager.

I imported "SF_LMS_Class_Management_v1.0" from content store, and I noticed the table on the Class Details page strange. 

There are many rows in the table, but there are many duplicate rows. What's wrong with this table? How can I make the same row visible only once?

If you know a solution, please explain it to me.

Thanks in advance.

Chandan

entry.title: The data sometimes comes out weird in the Story Report.
entry.content:
Hi community,

Recently, I have been making a LMS Story Report at the request of the HR manager.

I imported "SF_LMS_Class_Management_v1.0" from content store, and I sometimes find that the data looks weird.

As you can see in the attached picture below, the name of the lecture is shown as title. Item.~~~.
And when I press the title, it goes to the Class Detail page, but the data does not appear on that page either.

What's wrong with this chart? How can I get the name of the lecture to be exposed normally?

entry.title: Re: How i can update bom in sap b1?
entry.content:
Hi,

With the DTW it is best to to fill in values only if you need to update them. Otherwise, just leave the column empty. SAP recommends to always leave all columns, even when they are empty, but in my experience it is even easier to just exclude empty columns entirely.

When you only want to update component quantities, you do not even need the header file.

In the rows file, it is enough to fill in the ParentKey, LineNum and Quantity columns. Unless you want to change the ItemCode or Warehouse.

When you save the file, it is best to save as Text (Tab-delimited). This format will give you the least problems with content.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: 在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 中通过自定义逻辑限制未发料、未确认工单 101 入库

GR4XY_HEADER-SOURCEOFGR

你好老师，这个字段，还有别的值吗，总共分别是有几种情况。

entry.title: Re: Carry forward of PO to next FY without releasing of b...
entry.content: FMJ2 will not ask for budget in next FY, that's strange. Can you please share screen shot.

entry.title: Re: Managed RAP and errors (FAILED) from a determination.
entry.content:
Hi,
I could think of a workaround that when the API fails, you capture the failed message in a static variable that you would define in the implementation class, and in validation, check the value in static variable and fail the operation.
Thanks,
Sachin

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA file upload into S4
entry.content:
Yes, you can.
Feel free to use all SAP Business Hub -API's for S/4HANA System. 

The main issue is that your SPA Agent is located behind your firewall and can reach your system.
This setup can be achieved for instance with an installation in a Citrix Client.
You need also to build some automation for token request (Bearer or / and CSRF).
Use "Web Destination" component and build your API Call.

Try to use environment attributes that your project will be identified for OnPremise.
Thus helps to delegate your Project to the correct / desired Agent.

entry.title: Leaderboard for April's SAP Build Apps Challenge
entry.content:
I'm glad people are joining the SAP Build Apps Community Challenge, sharing their apps and techniques. For the challenge, 105 entries were received by 60 community members, with 11 having completed all 3 challenges so far.

It is not too late to enter, even from the beginning, as the challenges are not that long or complicated.

Here is the current status of those who have entered at least one of the challenges.

  • ✅means you got the challenge correct
  • ❌means you entered but did not submit the correct hash
  • 🟣means you did not enter that challenge

P.S.: The leaderboard was automatically generated with an app created with SAP Build Apps, using APIs for the community and @qmacro's hashing service, conditional formatting, containers for layouting, and lots of cool formulas 😸

entry.title: Re: ME28 - Add new fields in output
entry.content:
Appen your fields in these structure MEREP_OUTTAB_PURCHDOC .

Thank you
Saurabh

entry.title: Re: If I run Cross-Model Copy while doing a lot of data m...
entry.content: I believe so, you anyway need to try this out.

entry.title: Re: Managed RAP and errors (FAILED) from a determination.
entry.content: Its basically what I ended up doing. I added the cl_abap_behavior_saver_failed for the save_modified and added a singleton class that allows me to buffer errors not related to a Validation and then raise them in there. Works well but don't think it's a pretty solution 🙂

entry.title: Re: Sale order line item combined
entry.content:
Hi,

It is best and easiest to combine them before or while you enter them into SAP. How, depends on the way they are entered now. Does someone type them in manually, or copy-paste them from Excel or an email? Do you have an integration that enters them from a web store?

After that there are a few ways to accomplish this:

  • a. Right-click on the rows, and choose Copy table from the menu. b. Paste in Excel, sort and combine there. c. Delete all the rows from the Sales Order in B1. d. Copy and paste the item codes from excel to B1, and then the quantities, and if necessary, the prices.
  • a. Write and save a query that combines the rows. b. Delete all the rows from the Sales Order in B1. c. Copy and paste the item codes from the query result to B1, and then the quantities, and if necessary, the prices.
  • Build an addon to handle the previous suggestion.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: CLOUD拓展主数据库存地点替代MMSC
entry.content:
系统实现

使用Fiori APP：管理产品主数据，输入产品号

点击编辑

可以选择新增工厂或者拓展已有工厂的库存地点，点击以下进入工厂详细页面

在存储地点页签，新增需要拓展的库存地点

感谢观看

entry.title: Re: Life Cycle Management in SAP Datasphere: Transporting Content between Tenants
entry.content:
@yureshino Open SQL schema is not in the span of control of datasphere. The creation of the objects has happened via another tool (like an ETL tool or Postman). Ideally it's that tool that will also create or change the objects in the other tenants.
A normal HANA export/import done via DB explorer or any other tool connected to the Open SQL schema is also possible.

Thanks,
Marianne

entry.title: Re: Bring your own Git for SAP BTP ABAP Environment

Hi,

Well, I haven't found it. In the end we will do it through gCTS to deploy between subaccounts. And I will use abapgit for backup and for other types of deployments.

I was also not convinced that the repository had to be public. We are developing a product and need something private.

Anything I find out I'll tell you.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Managed RAP and errors (FAILED) from a determination.
entry.content: If it's a custom solution and not an extension to standard BO and with Strict (2) you are able to do everything, then I guess there's nothing more prettier than what you have done. 🙂

entry.title: Upcoming SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP Wednesday 24th April 2024
entry.content:
Dear Members, 

SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP is free in-person event brought to you by SAP Developer Advocates.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Wednesday 24th April 2024 in Bengaluru, India from 9:00 - 16:00 IST. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

Location: Applied Materials India Pvt. Limited, Wing- 2, Titanium Conference room, 1st Floor Innovator, ITPL, Whitefield - 560066

 If you would like to participate in this event. Please register using the RSVP in this event page: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/sap-codejam-abap-sap-btp-abap-environment-amp-rap/ev-p/13665789

Hurry up if you are interested as we have limited seats(30) which is fast filling. #SAPCodeJam

entry.title: Re: MM price condition for minimum order value at item level

entry.title: SAP EWM FAQ Series: How to setup monitoring and alerts
entry.content:
SAP EWM on SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition offers a whole range of comprehensive functionalities in warehouse operations and monitoring possibilities. With the variety of tools and methods at disposal, it can be difficult to gauge which method to use in order to acquire the exact missing piece of information. With this SAP Blog article, we will deal with the tips and tricks available to you regarding  the alert topic.

It is very important to get regular alerts on operational disruptions depending on the target audience, and it is even better when these alerts can be customized/setup once and then run automatically. There are several topics that are relevant.

How do I set up Alerts on overdue documents in EWM?
For the warehouse supervisors and key users, the Warehouse Management Monitor (Transaction /SCWM/MON) offers Alert functionalities for overdue alerts of different business objects. It is possible to define personal selection criterion such as “document types”, “overdue in hours/mins”, and “refresh time” to get regular updates on the overdue documents.

Figure 1 Warehouse Monitor - Setting up alerts on overdue documents

It is also possible to schedule the selections automatically as batch jobs and the users will be able to check the result. This is particular user friendly when the selection brings a huge result set and takes some time.
Figure 2 Warehouse Monitor - setting up batch processing

How do I set up Queue Monitoring and manual/automatic alerting?
Similarly, in the Warehouse Management Monitor, the node “Tools” can be used to check different interface errors. The sub-node “Message Queue” can be used to trigger alerts to the support organization in case critical interface errors occur.

Figure 3 Warehouse Monitor - Setting up Message Queue Alerts

For the queue monitoring, automatic alerts can be configured, and SAP EWM will send emails or SMS text messages to the defined user or user groups when a failed queue appears. Please check this guide on the detailed steps to setup the EWM alert framework: How to Configure Email Alerting for qRFC

How do I send messages/alerts to the RF devices?
Another useful tool that the warehouse supervisors and shifts in charge could use is to send messages to the connected devices of dedicated RF resources that are working in the warehouse, from Warehouse Management Monitor node “Resource management”:


How do I set up alerts for cases of warehouse operation disruptions?
There are some exceptional handling processes built inside of the SAP EWM which can trigger automatic alerts via workflow. In the customizing of Exception Handling, node Define Exception Codes, it is possible to define Active Workflows for process exceptions in SAP EWM. For e.g. to send emails automatically in case of pick denial, or physical inventory.



How do I develop comprehensive analysis on the warehouse operation status
Many of the S/4HANA EWM customers are already aware of the FIORI app Warehouse KPIs, which can be used to show the operation status of different EWM managed warehouses in a nutshell and it’s highly customizable. Please refer to the video from the SAP help documentation for details: Warehouse KPIs – Operations.

Furthermore, in S/4HANA Cloud for EWM there are a wide range of released CDS views that for customers and partners in the projects to use, for e.g. to integrate in SAP Analytic Cloud (SAC) and show additional and customized view of warehouse operation status. The available CDS views can be found in the SAP help documentation: CDS Views for Extended Warehouse Management and you can find an How-to-Guide with example here: Create KPI

Automatic system alerts via EWA reports
As from support organization (Application maintenance or IT team) perspective, automatic system alerts can be triggered regularly via SAP EarlyWatch Alert. The EWA alerts can be scheduled and sent automatic emails to the respective user groups. We have also enabled EWM specific checks for EWA report. Please check this blog for details.
Introduction of application specific Extended Warehouse Management Checks in SAP EarlyWatch Alert

Further reading materials for operational excellence
Now, the warehouse key users and support organization shall get timely and sufficient alerts from the SAP EWM managed warehouses. Next step is to analyze the errors and seek for possible resolution. To do so, SAP offers a wide range of tools, which can be checked from the following SAP Blogs:
The SAP Extended Warehouse Management FAQ Series: Support & Guidance Tools
The SAP Extended Warehouse Management FAQ Series: The ABAP Test Cockpit Checks for SAP EWM
Overview of the SAP EWM Check Monitor

Last but not least, if the errors are system related which need to be processed by next level of support, for e.g. creating an SAP customer incident, please refer to this SAP Blog for details:
Enriched version of Extended Warehouse Management Incident Creation with Support Assistant

entry.title: Re: SUM Queries
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

May I have a response here please?

 

Best Regards,
Darpan Kumar

entry.title: Re: Machines grouping in work centers for Textile Industry
entry.content: Hello DSK, this is exactly our proposed solution to the client to capture the machine number and the worker during the order confirmation. However, our client is asking for selecting the machine and the worker during the planning phase not the confirmation.

entry.title: Ashvini's Journey: Reimagining Success through SAP in a New Country
entry.content:
When Ashvini Kulkarni arrived in the US in December 2022, the skies over Boston were mostly grey. They might as well have been telling the story on the ground. The country was facing the widely expected recession following the pandemic. The news tickers on the airport TV were running headlines about tech layoffs, climbing mortgage rates and an uncharacteristically warm winter. “Quite a welcome!”, Ashvini thought.  

Feeling empowered to stand shoulder to shoulder with professionals who have years of industry experience: Ashvini.Hailing from the former princely city-state of Bhopal in India, it was not the first time Ashvini had flown far from her nest. Watching her father work on SAP kindled her interest in the Enterprise Ressource Planning (ERP) software. “My decision to pursue a career in SAP was heavily influenced by my father who happened to be an SAP user at one of the world-renowned multinational companies,” the 38-year-old explains. “His insights were invaluable, and they helped me realize the vast potential of SAP in the business world.” She soon found herself in Pune, working on SAP Business Planning and Consolidation (SAP BPC) for a Europe-based manufacturing client, was invited by her customers to go to Sweden, and later to Australia. Until things took a turn.  

Building a new professional identity from scratch

Ashvini got married and relocated to Boston in the United States, where her husband already lived. “In this new environment, I faced the challenge of building my professional identity from scratch,” she recalls. And despite her open work permit, the hiring freeze many companies put into place didn't help. With 12 years of experience in the field of SAP Business Planning and Consolidation consulting, Ashvini had a lot to show: a track record of various clients from diverse industries across the globe, many successfully completed implementation projects, numerous awards and appreciation from employers and clients, and a cosmopolitan mindset that only frequent travel could get you. But it wasn’t enough for Ashvini.  

To understand why, you need to know how Ashvini ticks. “I am deeply committed to continuous growth and self-improvement,” she says, “education and skill development remain a central focus, as I aspire to acquire advanced knowledge in my field and expand my skill set to excel professionally.” While traveling and exploration hold a special place in her heart, and immersing herself in new cultures, creating lasting memories, is important to her, personal growth and self-improvement are ongoing goals. “I aim to nurture my emotional intelligence, develop a deeper sense of empathy, and cultivate a growth mindset to enhance both my personal and professional life,” Ashvini summarizes.

SAP's digital skills initiative helped her get certified

And this is why she decided to SAP’s digital skills initiative. “Relocating to the U.S. prompted me to invest in continuous learning and skill development. Pursuing SAP software skills aligns with my goal of adapting to a new job market and building a strong professional identity in a new country.” So, she opted for a certification in SAP Analytics Cloud Planning – successfully passing the exam. 

Keen to try her hand at her newly acquired skill, the hunt for SAP Analytics Cloud roles and opportunities began. “A company named Forage was offering a simulation project with compelling exercises and technical challenges,” she says. Sensing an opportunity to keep her skills warm, Ashvini spent the next few weeks working in the simulation environment, exploring and testing SAP Analytics Cloud from every conceivable angle. 

Feeling empowered

Ashvini immediately sensed the extent of her decision to take the exam. “Obtaining the SAP Certification has been a remarkable milestone in my career. It has not only enhanced my technical knowledge but also boosted my self-confidence, particularly as I find myself navigating a new country and job market,” she says. “In a place where I'm starting fresh, this certification serves as a testament to my commitment to excel in the field of SAP.”  

Feeling empowered to stand shoulder to shoulder with professionals who have years of industry experience, she says she now feels confident to take on any challenge. “I am excited to explore new opportunities in the U.S. with this valuable SAP Analytics Cloud Planning certification as a key asset in my arsenal.” Knowing that employers value the verified skills she has, Ashvini is restarting her career. “Having an SAP Certification on my resume has made me a more attractive candidate to employers and increased my employability.” And it all started with her father laying the foundation for her success so many years ago.  

Start your own success story

Did you feel inspired by Ashvini’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more remarkable success stories! 

Are you looking to hire people like Ashvini? Reach out to the digital skills initiative for information on how to contact her and other people like her who are entering the SAP ecosystem with a fresh cloud-first mindset. We are happy to connect any partner or customer with our candidates to provide a mutual growth opportunity for new talent and the organizations supporting our ecosystem.

entry.title: Bug Report - iOS builds
entry.content: Dear Support team, I get following message from Apple when I upload iOS build with Transporter app: QUOTE ITMS-90725: SDK version issue - This app was built with the iOS 16.2 SDK. Starting April 29, 2024, all iOS and iPadOS apps must be built with the iOS 17 SDK or later, included in Xcode 15 or later, in order to be uploaded to App Store Connect or submitted for distribution. UNQUOTE 2024 April 29 is soon, after we will be blocked from uploading builds on Apple if SAP Builds Build compiler is not updated. Please ensure Build compiler is updated asap, thank you for your attention! Best regards, Chung Chan

entry.title: Re: Mass Change Equipment User Status using Master Data I...
entry.content: Try to do the changes using IH08 and see if this works

entry.title: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Greetings,

Having recently discovered @David_Chaviano's blog post about the Digital Skills Initiative, I am eager to express my interest in availing of a free certificate opportunity. With nearly a year of experience as an SAP Analytics Cloud Consultant, I am keen to further develop my skills in SAP technologies.

I eagerly await your response.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Decrease material value with 0 quantity issue
entry.content:
Hello @Fatima1 

Don't look for any alternatives, just use MR22. Debiting/Crediting Materials changes material value not quantity. That is exactly what you need, isn't it?

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: After Update BI 4.3 SP03 Patch 6 Error running the pr...
entry.content: Hello Joe, Thanks for the tip, but the service account with which we start the SIA and the Tomcat is already set with "Revoke a process level token". And it still doesn't work.

entry.title: Re: One Invoice, Multiple Purchase Order from Ariba Network
entry.content: Hi, Here's a link for the transaction rule that buyers can enable: https://help.sap.com/docs/ariba/978b7e36451a4c2c85321a3ef6f3a7e5/f5881ca5896a42f28edc4324a0d78c3f.html?q=multiple%20PO%20reference

entry.title: SAP ECC to S/4HANA with Qlik Sense
entry.content:
Hello,

Need advice on the best strategy for migrating from SAP ECC to S/4HANA while using Qlik Sense: should we maintain daily data extractions with Qlik using SAP tables, or opt to use CDS views? Bearing in mind that the latter option would require a complete adaptation of all Qlik applications? If so, would this adaptation be sensible and easy to undertake?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: change in URL to "vhcal<SID>ci/cs" during call IC Web...
entry.content: Hi Joerg (W.), I found the solution. In transaction /UI2/FLPD_CUST - Lanchpad Designer it is possible to change the target mappings for Semantic Object S4CRM_ICwebC which is call when click on the tile.

entry.title: Re: RAP: Creating a child entity with 'create by associat...
entry.content: Remote diagnosis is difficult. I haven't seen that error yet. Double check whether you use %tky and %is_draft correctly in all places. If you have character-like key fields, try to create a root entity and then create child entities with uppercase keys to ensure that the issue is not case-sensitivity.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Process Navigator does not show Best Pra...
entry.content:
Hello Olivier,

There has been no change in the availability of solution scenarios between On-Premise and Private Cloud deployments. Both On-Premise and Private Cloud deployments offer the same product functionality. The only distinction lies in the deployment type, not in the features or solutions provided. Therefore, the solution scenarios available for Private Cloud are indeed identical to those for On-Premise.

Best,

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content:
@YuchingLee 

We have sent emails to all production instances that will be excluded from the universal push. If you have a production instance but have not received an email notification about this exclusion, it means your instance will be included in the universal push. Consequently, it will be updated to the latest version within 1H 2024.

entry.title: In the Recent Version(2402), SAP S/4 Hana Cloud, Is there provision for Configuring Funds Management
entry.content: In the Recent Version(2402), SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud, Is there provision for Configuring Funds Management if not then How to proceed ?

entry.title: Re: How to generate a Hyperlink to another Story within a...
entry.content: Hey Pascal thanks for the answer, but your solution only works for shapes. I would like to automatically generate text for example in a text field that then represents a link to another story. Best regards Felix

entry.title: SAP CPI Merge different payloads to single
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have a scenario where I need to merge the response of api call to input payload.  Please  suggest how this can be achieved.

InputPayload (Json) -> convert to xml -> use message mapping to map the input payload fields to api fields -> trigger api call -> response returned is in xml format (add it to the InputPayload ??)

entry.title: SAP UI5 How to keep a view Session alive on TV?
entry.content:
Hello,

my customer has the requirement to show a UI5 app on an external TV all of the time. My question is now how to manage it, that the session won't get lost and the TV is not going to be black?

Thanks!
Regards

Andreas

I already know the link and the step but I can't find the correct one to submit an improvement for S/HANA procurement/MRP/master data

Ingrid

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP - Monitoring Usage and Consumption Costs in Your Global Account
entry.content:
Hi vinodgkrishna,
thanks for this post: it's very helpful; I have a question: is it possible to activate some kind of alert (e.g. notifications, email) if a service or instance exceeds the average monthly cost or a specific amount?
Thanks,
Simone

entry.title: List of Employee Central & Employee Central Payroll Guide Updates for the 1H 2024 Release
entry.content:
In SAP SuccessFactors User Assistance for Employee Central, we’ve been working on improving your information experience.

Global Benefits

The Global Benefits Implementation guide has been enhanced to include Latest Benefits Enrollment Experience. This experience enables the user (employee) to enroll, manage, opt out of the required benefits using a linear, more convenient, cart-based selection method.

For more information, refer to the Global Benefits - Before Starting: Am I reading the right documentation? SAP Help Portal topic. 

People Profile

The latest People Profile features a brand-new public view of your profile, consisting of Profile Preview and Spotlight, along with more intuitive user interactions. Learn more about the new experience in the What’s New Viewer:

  • New Experience for People Profile | SAP Help Portal
  • New Experience for People Profile Now in SAP SuccessFactors Mobile | SAP Help Portal
  • Deprecation of Legacy People Profile | SAP Help Portal

 

Updated Guides for Employee Central

Guide

Change

Details

Implementing Address Typeahead and Address Validation Service

Updated title

The title of this guide was updated with the addition of the address typeahead feature

Managing Apprentices

Merged

This content is available in the Implementing and Managing Apprentices guide

Deprecated Guides for Employee Central

Guide

Change

Details

Integrating SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central with Thomsons Darwin

Deprecated

Removed from the Help Portal

Standard Benefits Integration Template for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

Deprecated

Removed from the Help Portal

Standard Payroll Integration Template for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

Deprecated

Removed from the Help Portal

Standard Time Integration Template for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

Deprecated

Removed from the Help Portal

 

Updated Guides for Employee Central Payroll

Guide

Change

Details

Employee Central Payroll Feature Scope Description

Renamed

The new name is Employee Central Payroll Product Description.  

Integration Guides Overview for Recruit to Retire

Added

Added to the product page in the Integrate tab

Deprecated Guides for Employee Central Payroll

Guide

Change

Details

Migrating Master Data from Legacy Software Component EA-HRRXX using Boomi to Point-to-Point Integration

Deprecated

This content is available in Previous Releases. You can download the PDF file.

 

Migrating Master Data from Legacy Software Component PA-SE-IN using Boomi to Point-to-Point Integration

Deprecated

This content is available in Previous Releases. You can download the PDF file.

 

 

Migrating Time Data Integration from Legacy Software Component PA-SE-IN using Boomi to Point-to-Point Integration

Deprecated

This content is available in Previous Releases. You can download the PDF file.

entry.title: Error while posting the document. (1260 Special Loan REC)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

I have getting the error while posting of 3 employee documents. screen shoot attached. we are maintain the data in IT-0045 (Special repayment) external. while again posting the document same error occurred. 

Please guide the needful.

entry.title: Re: Pay statement visibility for former employees
entry.content:
Hi, 
As former employees are no longer in the company and they do not have access to the portal they wont be able to access EC Pay Statement Mashup. 
As far as I know there is no KBA mentioning such scenario. 
I guess that a ESS portal with just the pay statement and provide such employees a user active linked to the terminated employee may fulfil your requirement but this is much investment.  
My suggestion this case is to have a termination process that executes in the background a custom program to send the pay statement with password to former employee via email. As it will be a custom program it can itself choose employees terminated just during last payroll period so PERNR choosing may be automatic. 
Hope it helps,
Regards,

entry.title: java.io.IOException: Attempted read from closed stream
entry.content:
Good day,

We have setup new integrations on Integration Suite which connect to Success Factors API via API Management.

We get the following error when the integration runs on schedule (intermittently):

java.io.IOException: Attempted read from closed stream

We are unable to pin point or reproduce the error in our QA environement.

Has anyone experienced or resolved this issue before?

Regards,

Brandon

entry.title: 403 Forbidden Error on CAP Service when running UI5 app on locally
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am currently experiencing an issue when i am trying to run UI5 App locally which is consuming a CAP service. I get 403 forbidden error on the CAP service and the metadeta does not load. I have setup the approuter and I am using default-env.json to run my local setup. My front-end app runs on localhost:5000 and CAP service runs on localhost:4000. When I run the front-end the UI gets authenticated via XSUAA but the services return 403 error, any pointers to resolve this issue?
package.json of CAP Project

{
  "name": "Test",
  "version": "0.0.2",
  "repository": "<Add your repository here>",
  "license": "ISC",
  "dependencies": {
    "@sap/cds": "3.34.3",
    "@sap/hana-client": "2.20.20",
    "@sap/xsenv": "^5.1.0",
    "@sap/xssec": "^3.6.1",
    "axios": "1.6.8",
    "currency-symbol": "1.0.6",
    "dotenv": "^16.4.5",
    "express": "^4.19.2",
    "fiscal-year": "1.0.0",
    "helmet": "^7.1.0",
    "moment": "2.30.1",
    "passport": "^0.7.0",
    "uuid": "^9.0.1",
    "xlsx": "^0.18.5"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": "^18",
    "npm": "^6"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "preinstall": "echo %npm_package_name%",
    "build": "cds build/all --clean",
    "deploy:cds": "cds deploy",
    "start": "cds run",
    "build:mta": "cds build/all && mbt build -p=cf",
    "deploy:cf": "npm run build:mta && cf deploy mta_archives/%npm_package_name%_%npm_package_version%.mtar",
    "push": "cf deploy mta_archives/%npm_package_name%_%npm_package_version%.mtar",
    "test": "jest",
    "testWatch": "jest --watch --expand --all",
    "coverage": "jest --coverage",
    "watch": "nodemon --watch \"./**\" --exec \"cds run\""
  },
  "cds": {
    "hana": {
      "deploy-format": "hdbtable"
    },
    "requires": {
      "db": {
        "kind": "hana",
        "model": [
          "db",
          "srv"
        ]
      },
      "uaa": {
        "kind": "xsuaa"
      }
    },
    "odata": {
      "version": "v4"
    }
  },
  "files": [
    "db",
    "srv"
  ],
  "devDependencies": {
    "jest": "^29.7.0",
    "nodemon": "^3.1.0"
  }
}

Package.json of the front-end app

{
  "name": "users",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "engines": {
    "node": "^18"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "node node_modules/@sap/approuter/approuter.js",
    "start:flp": "ui5 serve -o flpSandbox.html",
    "serve": "ui5 serve",
    "test": "run-s lint karma",
    "karma-ci": "karma start karma-ci.conf.js",
    "clearCoverage": "shx rm -rf coverage",
    "karma": "run-s clearCoverage karma-ci",
    "lint": "eslint .",
    "build:mta": "mbt build",
    "deploy:cf": "cross-var cf deploy mta_archives/users_$npm_package_version.mtar",
    "deploy": "run-s build:mta deploy:cf",
    "build:ui": "ui5 build --clean-dest --include-task=generateManifestBundle --dest deployer/resources/webapp"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@openui5/sap.m": "^1.75.0",
    "@openui5/themelib_sap_belize": "^1.75.0",
    "@openui5/themelib_sap_fiori_3": "^1.75.0",
    "@sap/approuter": "^9.1.0",
    "appdata-path": "^1.0.0",
    "shx": "^0.3.2"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@ui5/cli": "^2.4.1",
    "eslint": "^6.8.0",
    "karma": "^5.0.9",
    "karma-chrome-launcher": "^3.1.0",
    "karma-coverage": "^2.0.1",
    "karma-ui5": "^1.1.0",
    "mbt": "1.0.9",
    "npm-run-all": "^4.1.5",
    "ui5-middleware-cfdestination": "^0.1.5",
    "ui5-middleware-livereload": "^0.1.7"
  },
  "ui5": {
    "dependencies": [
      "ui5-middleware-cfdestination",
      "@openui5/sap.m",
      "@openui5/themelib_sap_belize",
      "@openui5/themelib_sap_fiori_3",
      "ui5-middleware-livereload"
    ]
  }
}

xs-app.json of the front-end app 
 

{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod" : "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/admin/(.*)$",
      "target": "/admin/$1",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "destination": "srv_api",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/master/(.*)$",
      "target": "/master/$1",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "destination": "srv_api",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/profile/(.*)$",
      "target": "/profile/$1",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "destination": "srv_api",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/user/(.*)$",
      "target": "/user/$1",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "destination": "srv_api",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/forecast/(.*)$",
      "target": "/forecast/$1",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "destination": "srv_api",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "localDir": "webapp"
    }
  ]
}

 Regards,

Rachit Gupta

entry.title: Exposing existing odata service in public cloud as an API endpoint
entry.content: In SAP HANA Public Cloud. For an existing SAP standard Fiori App, is it possible to create an API endpoint for the odata service so that the data can be extracted externally via a tool like postman?

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors: Terminated user able to access and do...
entry.content:
I guess that is not a desirable solution unless you manage that user in EC to have only access to just his profile and only the Pay Statement Mashups. There are also other possibilities as explained in this other blog with a similar question. 
Pay statement visibility for former employees - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 2 - Formulas
entry.content:
Hi Dan,
Thanks for another challenge, I learned something with each of your challenges.
My Hash: bc2a37c36c34280d849d86967dbea24aa340d835ecf74b66da826f9245b74612

entry.title: Re: Issue when using SAP UI5 library sap.ui.export.Spread...
entry.content: The issue was resolved by changing the implementation of spreadsheet export from server-side to client side. Rows of the table was used as data source instead of backend API.

entry.title: AI & External Workforce: A New Technology Trend that unlocks tremendous value to businesses.
entry.content:
As companies continue to embrace the idea of digital transformation, integrating Artificial Intelligence into external workforce management offers them numerous chances to improve productivity and streamline processes. Thanks to modern technological advancements, particularly AI, tasks can now be completed more effectively and intelligently than ever before.

Through AI, companies can boost their organizations’ productivity and advance their talent strategies as it relates to the external workforce. This is business critical, as external workers provide a breadth of skills and contributions to a company’s total workforce. Let's take a closer look at some of these significant developments that artificial intelligence is revolutionizing and how they can work together to help both businesses and external workers  reach their full potential:

Boost Productivity through Process Excellence, powered by Artificial Intelligence

The days of manually writing down job descriptions and establishing requirements for job roles in a solution are over.  Recruitment operations for the external workforce have become smarter because of digital transformation and artificial intelligence. This has pushed organizations to digitize and optimize HR processes for both internal and external workers.

With SAP Fieldglass' Generative AI capabilities, you can now easily generate more effective Job Descriptions, populating specific and relevant skill sets required for Job Templates your organization  frequently hires for.

Fig. 1. Generative AI Enhancing Job Descriptions for Job Posting Templates

Fig. 2. Generative AI Proposing an Enhanced Job Description for Job Posting Templates

Resourcing & Workforce Optimization

 As the number of external workers increases, it becomes more and more important to ensure that organizations allocate resources optimally to support critical business operations and to fill in critical talent gaps. Businesses can learn about the availability of skills and business demand by utilizing data points and algorithms in resource planning and workforce scheduling.

This is where the value of an intelligent Vendor Management System such as SAP Fieldglass comes into play. You can be sure that your company operates at peak efficiency thanks to AI-powered Candidate Screening and Analysis and data-driven insights. SAP Fieldglass supports workforce planning and resource allocation to optimize existing workers and ensure availability of in-demand and relevant talent.

Fig. 3. Smart Candidate Screening through Resume Ranking via Skill Analysis

Talent Management & Succession Planning

Having an integrated approach to your organizational talent management strategy is made easier by being aware of the strengths and opportunities for growth of your external workers. These resources have critical skill areas and often serve in-demand roles within your business. It becomes critical to comprehend which members of your External Workforce Talent Pool are most qualified to be retained and eventually converted into your full-time employees based on KPIs set to measure performance.

Through intelligent vendor management technology, SAP Fieldglass enables your company to view qualified external workers from your diverse talent pool and intelligently evaluate them to choose, hire, and retain the highest performing resources. Configurations for performance and criteria help guarantee that you choose and keep the best external workers who can help your business succeed.

Fig. 4. Available External Worker Candidates from SAP Fieldglass’ Talent Pool

Learn more about how SAP Fieldglass, empowered by Artificial Intelligence, helps your business and the External Workforce things done efficiently and intelligently.

entry.title: Terraform scenarios – beyond provisioning resources.
entry.content:
You are using Terraform for SAP BTP and are curious what you could do beyond “just” provisioning resources? Then these blog posts might be of interest for you:

  • Interested in how to configure the remote state and do drift detection via GitHub Action? Then this blog post is for you: https://dev.to/lechnerc77/terraform-provider-for-sap-btp-remote-state-and-drift-detection-3pnj
  • Scratching you head about a secure automation when applying changes to resources with accidentally deleting important resources? Here you go by combining Terraform and the Open Policy Agent: https://dev.to/lechnerc77/sap-btp-terraform-and-open-policy-agent-243m
  • You would like to bring your developer experience to a new level using a developer portal like #Backstage. Then this blog post gives you an idea how you can achieve this: https://dev.to/lechnerc77/-enable-developers-on-sap-btp-with-terraform-github-actions-and-backstage-357e

The code behind these scenarios is available on GitHub: https://github.com/btp-automation-scenarios – no workarounds, everything you see is already possible today!

Happy Terraforming ... and more!

entry.title: how to modify a get endpoint for cds
entry.content:
I am staring with cap application with typescript

refer the service defined in a cds file as below

service AssignmentService {
    function Version() returns many String;
    entity AssignmentComponent as projection on ft.AssignmentComponent;
}

Queries
1. for GET method of AssignmentService, I want a custom response as { "msg":  "hello" }. Is this possible? If possible, how. Reference will be of help.
2 .for get AssignmentService.Version(), required response as { ["1.0.0" ,"1.0.1"] }

How can the above be implemented?

references/samples are welcome.

entry.title: How to convert xstring data to PDF?
entry.content:
Hello,

My requirement is as below:

  1. I have a invoice pdf which is being generated from the smartform. (Driver program is written in the output type configuration - NACE transaction)
  2. I am using 'CONVERT_OTF' to get the xstring value of the smartform.
  3. I am sending the xstring data to third party system which does the validation of the invoice, sign it and returns the xstring of the signed PDF. (API call is done to the third party system)
  4. I want to use the xstring of the signed PDF and print the signed PDF or display the print preview of the signed PDF. (This should be done inside driver program)

Can someone guide me how to achieve the same?

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: Check out the leaderboard for the challenge and see your status: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-discussions/leaderboard-for-april-s-sap-build-apps-challenge/m-p/13670393

entry.title: Inspection type 03 result recording accept reject impact on next operation confirmation and GR.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I activated Inspection Type 03 for InProcess Inspection and I did the result recording in QA32 for this Inspection Lot and for this operation the result recorded was out of range due to which this lot got rejected so the UD is also rejected but then also confirmation is allowing for next operation and also GR also posted for this Production order by increasing the stock of material. So may I know why its not stopping to do confirmation of next operation if previous operation result recording/UD is Rejected and also why its not stopping to do GR which is updating the stock of this material.

PLM Quality Management (QM) SAP ERP @rupesh_brahmankar3

entry.title: SAP DM - Master Data Management
entry.content:
SAP Digital Manufacturingis a promising, rapidly evolving tool for manufacturing companies. It is a solid successor for SAP ME / SAP MII. While SAP DM has many great functions and capabilities that make it a full-fledged MES, I want to now discuss the obstacles users are currently facing with master data migration & synchronization 

Not all master data objects and configurations can be transferred from your ERP system. Instead, this data needs to be currently manually entered directly into SAP DM by the responsible planner or SAP DM keyuser. There are two use cases to consider:

  1. Master data migration is part of every project. When you switch from the test to the productive environment, you need to transfer your data.
  2. Your production is executed at more than one site and you don't want to create the same master data twice in different SAP DM plants. Think about easy and quick master data transport between plants. 

Why is this an issue?

If you don’t have many entries, this doesn’t seem to be a big problem. In fact, developing a solution might even be more expensive than the time your employees or colleagues must spend on the manual process. But try to think long-term or even mid-term: How often do you need to upload, transfer, and synchronize data, and how much time does this cost each time you do it? In addition, the more master data you must enter manually, the higher the probability of errors. Again, the more data you have, the more likely it is that something will go wrong. The last point I would like to address in this context is employee satisfaction. Imagine investing long hours into a repetitive task that can easily be automated.  

It is true that you must consider the frequency of such tasks: Does it only occur once in a while or is it something you have to deal with frequently? How much is a quick upload & synchronization worth? How many errors can you accept in the process? 

Upon addressing the questions above, you can - at the moment - choose one of the following options: 

  1. Continue with the manual process and take the above stated challenges as a given.
  2. Invest resources and create your own solution in-house or with the help of an implementation specialist. 
  3. Use an existing master data management tool for SAP DM. Here you can even opt for a SaaS app that is instantly available and can be easily canceled should you no longer need it. This keeps your investment (both in terms of time and money) transparent. 

What do you think about?

entry.title: Re: How to use OAuth 2.0 authorization while using SAP S/...
entry.content:
Hi Jerry

we are using SAP Cloud Identity Services as our IAS.   We have Microsoft Azure > SAP Cloud Identity Services > S4HC.

I had set up all the required communication arrangement details and it works - except that the popups for scope would not be acceptable for a 3rd Party application that want to call our S4HC APIs.

on that link that you sent me what do they mean by subject_token and how do I obtain one of those ? Do you know?

Also

Our S4HC URL is https://my<number>.s4hana.ondemand.com/

are they also suggesting to obtain a token you use https://my<number>.s4hana.ondemand.com/oauth2/token..... and that you also repeat the client_id and secret not only in the request parameters but also in the authenication header.

entry.title: Recap of SAP Community Stammtisch at Mindset Consulting Bangalore : April 4th
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm thrilled to share that we recently hosted an insightful SAP Stammtisch event at Mindset Consulting Bangalore office, and it was an absolute success! 🎉

SAP enthusiasts and professionals converged to delve into the latest trends, innovations, and best practices within the SAP ecosystem.
Witnessing so many passionate individuals come together to share their knowledge and experiences was truly inspiring. 💡

The event every was filled with valuable insights and networking opportunities. We delved into a diverse range of topics, including:

Issues Faced with Custom Apps and Logic for BW Applications
Integration Suite and PI/PO
Performance Comparison of Fiori Elements and Freestyle Fiori Applications
Rise with SAP, Grow with SAP
Exploring Workzone and Comparing SAP Build Automation with Traditional SAP Workflow

A heartfelt shoutout to all the attendees who generously shared their expertise and sparked engaging conversations. Your contributions truly elevated the event and made it an unforgettable experience! 👏

But it wasn't all about work - we also enjoyed plenty of fun and camaraderie along the way! From indulging in delicious refreshments to participating in interactive activities like "2 Truths and a Lie," there was never a dull moment at the SAP Stammtisch.

Thank you to everyone who contributed to making this event a resounding success! Your enthusiasm and active participation were the driving forces behind our memorable gathering.

And for those who couldn't make it this time, fret not! Stay tuned for future SAP Stammtisch events, where we'll continue to foster connections, facilitate learning, and grow as a community.

Let's keep the SAP conversation alive and continue making strides towards innovation and excellence in the digital world! 💼✨ 

 SAP Fiori Cloud   SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition    SAP BTP, ABAP environment   SAP Integration Suite   SAP Build Apps   SAP Build Process Automation  

@AkhilDas  @Kamalika_bhar @maheshpalavalli

entry.title: Re: Need help with SAP CPI iflow
entry.content: figured the issue and now working fine

entry.title: Re: 🇷🇴 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Timisoara, RO)
entry.content:
Hello @Vitaliy-R!

Is the CodeJam supposed to be held from 10:00 to 16:00 current Romanian Time?
I am asking because due to the Daylight Saving Time, the current time for Romania is UTC+3 while the description of the event lists the time in UTC+2.
